name: Planning Center Church Management API
what_it_does: Planning Center REST API for church management platform (ChMS). Enables AI agents to manage church member and household records, track giving and pledge data, manage service and worship planning, handle volunteer scheduling, process event registrations, sync ministry data across Planning Center products (People, Giving, Services, Groups, Registrations), and integrate church data with external systems.
use_cases: Managing church member profiles and household records from congregation management agents
Retrieving giving and pledge history from stewardship reporting agents
Automating volunteer scheduling for worship services from ministry operations agents
Managing event registrations and group membership from church administration agents
not_for: Non-religious organizations without church-specific ministry management needs
Large enterprise CRM without faith community workflow focus
For-profit events management without ministry planning components
best_when: A church or ministry organization using Planning Center wants AI agents to automate member data management, giving tracking, volunteer coordination, and event registration workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Church member data including giving history and family information is highly sensitive. Religious affiliation data has heightened privacy protections in many jurisdictions.

auth.notes: Planning Center uses OAuth 2.0 and personal access tokens (API key). OAuth for third-party app integrations with user consent. Personal access tokens for server-to-server. Scopes are per-product (People, Giving, Services, etc.). Each Planning Center product has separate API scope.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for small churches (up to 25 people in some products); API access on all plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-product monthly pricing based on active records
pricing.notes: San Luis Obispo, CA. Christian church management platform. Suite of products (People, Giving, Services, Groups, Registrations, Check-Ins, Publishing). Each product has separate pricing and API. Very developer-friendly with comprehensive documentation.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Religious affiliation and giving data has heightened privacy protections
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 or personal access tokens
Multiple Planning Center products have separate APIs and scopes — request correct product scopes
100 requests per 20 seconds rate limit — throttle bulk operations
US data residency only — verify for international church networks
Excellent developer documentation — one of the more developer-friendly ChMS platforms
agent_readiness.security_notes: Religious affiliation and giving data with heightened privacy sensitivity. SOC2. OAuth2 with product-level scopes. US data residency. One of best-documented ChMS APIs.

security_score_components.security_notes: Religious affiliation and giving data. SOC2. OAuth2 with product scopes. US data residency only.
